purpose: Machine-readable contract per build unit — the ACTUAL input to the Comprehension Gate (U2) and the source of truth for spec-03. spec-03 prose is the human view; THIS is what the gate parses. Comprehension checks (coverage of acceptance[], files_touched ⊆ file_targets, invariants ⊇, gates ⊇) run against these arrays deterministically.

units.title: Verifier oracle
acceptance: run_pipeline returns (False, verdicts) on the first HARD non-PASS verdict
a verifier raising internally is caught and mapped to CANNOT_DECIDE, never PASS
every Verdict is JSON-serialisable for the cognition-log
units.commit: feat(verify): typed Verifier oracle with honest CANNOT_DECIDE verdict (spec-01)

units.title: Comprehension gate
acceptance: plan omitting any acceptance[] entry for the unit returns FAIL with diagnosis naming the uncovered criteria
a files_touched entry not in the unit's file_targets returns FAIL
invariants ⊉ unit.invariants or gates ⊉ unit.gates returns FAIL
out_of_scope empty OR containing a token not in out_of_scope_vocab returns CANNOT_DECIDE
lgwks comprehend --unit <id> --file plan.json returns a Verdict object
invariants: gate reads units.json (this file), not prose markdown
all checks are coverage/subset tests on arrays — no semantic-similarity heuristic
units.commit: feat(comprehend): Intention×Understanding gate — plan must cover units.json before code (spec-01)

units.title: Fix three gate bugs (#29)
acceptance: refine('Find me machine focused research on how ML to AI training occurs') does NOT abstain blaming the human; it proceeds or returns classifier_coverage_gap
a CAPTCHA/bot-challenge fixture page is rejected by crawl's source-validity gate, not ingested into concepts
public output is either relevance-filtered above a similarity floor OR carries an explicit ranking label (no silent canon-as-relevance)
invariants: fix targets the refine() function (classifier-unknown-vs-user-vagueness unbind at the gaps-assignment AND the abstain decision AND question-emission), NOT a single line number
no gate weakening — fix the model under the gate
units.commit: fix(gates): unbin classifier-failure from user-vagueness; add relevance+source-validity gates (#29)

units.title: G3 framework-reality gate
acceptance: candidate referencing a symbol that exists in the crate but at a DIFFERENT installed version than assumed → FAIL with version-skew diagnosis
pre-generation: emits the installed symbol surface (from cargo metadata + rustdoc JSON) as grounding context
missing rustdoc JSON → CANNOT_DECIDE, never silently PASS
invariants: G3 covers version-skew + pre-gen grounding ONLY; bare symbol-existence on COMPILED Rust is G0's job (rustc errors E0433/E0425) — do NOT reimplement the compiler
the path/symbol extractor MUST declare its false-PASS surface (a missed reference = false PASS); if it cannot be bounded complete, the existence portion is ADVISORY
units.commit: feat(gate): G3 framework-reality — version-skew + pre-gen grounding vs installed surface (spec-00)

units.title: G1 architecture gate
acceptance: reads arch-rules.json; a module violating a HARD forbidden-import rule (e.g. data-boundary-no-network) → FAIL naming the edge
an ADVISORY rule violation (e.g. no-module-level-mutable-global) → ADVISORY score + note, never FAIL
a conformant fixture → PASS
each rule's HARD|ADVISORY class is read from arch-rules.json, never decided at runtime
invariants: rule source = docs/frontier/arch-rules.json (ships with this spec; canvas-motion Rust rules added later)
per-rule klass is declared in data, not chosen by the agent (no gate-weakening backdoor)
units.commit: feat(gate): G1 architecture conformance from arch-rules.json (spec-00)

units.title: G2 idiom gate
acceptance: always returns an ADVISORY verdict (never FAIL, never blocks ship)
emits a score in 0..1 + an idiom-diff report (nearest in-repo exemplars + deviations)
on embedder failure returns ADVISORY+CANNOT_DECIDE (excluded from the report's score aggregation, surfaced separately) — NOT a 0 score
invariants: no ECE/calibration acceptance is claimed — there is no held-out idiom-labeled dataset in-repo; calibration is deferred until one is constructed (logged, not asserted)
units.commit: feat(gate): G2 idiom advisory score + idiom-diff report (spec-00)

units.title: Coherence pipeline
acceptance: registers gates in canonical order G0→G1→G3→G2 (G0=cargo build/test, G1, G3 HARD; G2 ADVISORY)
a hallucinated-API candidate is blocked (by G0 compile-error, surfaced as the G0 verdict) and never ships
an all-pass candidate ships with the advisory report attached and all verdicts appended to the cognition-log
pipeline is deterministic and replayable from the log
invariants: the host Rust crate/working-dir for G0+G3 is an explicit --crate-dir argument (the candidate's project); cohere fails CANNOT_DECIDE if no crate context is given — it never guesses
G0 ownership of symbol-existence; G3 only adds version-skew (per U4)
units.commit: feat(cohere): Coherence Engine pipeline G0→G1→G3→G2 with cognition-log audit (spec-00)
